name: SSH server
description: Adds an SSH server supervised as a native s6-overlay service.

gatewayPorts.description: Enable other hosts in the same network to connect to the forwarded ports

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container includes a key-only SSH server for external terminals, SFTP, and SSHFS. Mount an authorized_keys file into the remote user's .ssh directory and connect on port 2222. Root login and password authentication are disabled.
